headers.origin: when present, exact member of nonempty configured allowlist
headers.mcp_protocol_version: exact 2025-11-25 on every POST or DELETE
headers.mcp_session_id: SDK-issued UUID on initialize; required on subsequent session requests
headers.forwarded: rejected; no forwarded-header trust in loopback development

application_limit_composition: The transport byte caps are intentionally tighter than the 64 MiB decoded replay verifier cap; every request and response must satisfy both layers.
authorization: An injected OAuth resource-server profile is available for loopback embedding. The CLI remains explicit local development, and non-loopback startup stays impossible until tenant/rate/audit/drain controls are complete.
